translations.en: Draxinusom
translations.zh: 崔西努森
translations.note: NPC name — glossary 已有（Lord Draxinusom→崔西努森王）

translations.en: a large, winged gargoyle of regal bearing.
translations.zh: 體形高大之有翼魔像，儀態威嚴。

translations.en: The gargoyle screams, "An-bal-sil-fer! Klep lem! Por-aylem ter-ort ka!"
translations.zh: 魔像嘶聲大喊：「An-bal-sil-fer！Klep lem！Por-aylem ter-ort ka！」

translations.en: "To be honored by your presence, noble $P. To feel sorrow that matters of state prevent conversation."
translations.zh: 「高貴之$P蒞臨，深感榮幸。惜國事繁忙，無暇詳談。」
translations.note: 崔西努森帶玉璽架子的話語

translations.en: "To summon you when proper time for your sacrifice has come."
translations.zh: 「待汝獻祭之時辰已至，吾將召見汝。」

translations.en: "To refrain from slaying you only because of the presence of the child, False Prophet!"
translations.zh: 「偽先知！吾之所以暫不誅汝，唯因孩童在場！」

translations.en: "To demand to know why you have returned here, False Prophet!"
translations.zh: 「偽先知！吾要求汝說明，為何再度回到此處！」

translations.en: "To express astonishment at your audacity, False Prophet!"
translations.zh: 「偽先知！汝之膽大妄為，令吾瞠目結舌！」

translations.en: "To be named Draxinusom, leader of our race."
translations.zh: 「吾名崔西努森，吾族之統領。」

translations.en: "To demand to know why you have come before me!"
translations.zh: 「吾要求汝說明，為何來見吾！」

translations.en: "To be the leader of our race. To have little time to waste chatting with the False Prophet!"
translations.zh: 「吾乃吾族統領。無暇在此與偽先知閒聊！」

translations.en: "Flee, False Prophet! To seize you for sacrifice the instant my army returns from the Underworld!"
translations.zh: 「偽先知，速逃！吾之大軍自幽冥界歸返之際，便是擒汝獻祭之時！」

translations.en: The gargoyle shows you a crystal amulet dangling from a leather cord.
translations.zh: 魔像展示一枚以皮繩穿掛的水晶護符。

translations.en: "Hsss....To consent to wear this?"
translations.zh: 「嘶……願佩戴此物嗎？」
translations.note: ssss 蛇聲保留 hiss 擬聲感

translations.en: Trusted Dupre whispers frantically to you, "You mustn't! It's some sort of magical trap!"
translations.zh: 身旁信賴的杜普雷急聲低語：「你不能戴！那是某種魔法陷阱！」
translations.note: 旁白，Dupre 發音已有 glossary

translations.en: The gargoyle waits impatiently for an answer. "Yes or no, False Prophet?"
translations.zh: 魔像不耐地等候答覆。「偽先知，是還是否？」

translations.en: "To have known it all along!"
translations.zh: 「吾早知如此！」

translations.en: "To be a fool for trusting the False Prophet for a moment!"
translations.zh: 「片刻信任偽先知，吾真是愚蠢至極！」

translations.en: "To be suspicious of thy motives..."
translations.zh: 「吾對汝之動機深感懷疑……」

translations.en: "To be necessary for surrender! To ask again for your acceptance of this."
translations.zh: 「此乃歸降所必需！再次問汝是否接受。」

translations.en: Your answer:
translations.zh: 你的答覆：

translations.en: The gargoyle hands you the amulet, and you slip the leather loop over your head.
translations.zh: 魔像將護符遞給你，你將皮繩套過頭頂。

translations.en: "To surprise me with the nobility of your deed. To no longer be a threat to my people."
translations.zh: 「汝之行為之高尚出乎意料。汝已不再是吾族之威脅。」

translations.en: "To bid you to travel among my people, talk to them, learn our ways."
translations.zh: 「吾准許汝往來吾族之中，與彼等交談，習吾族之道。」

translations.en: "To inform you when the time of your sacrifice has come."
translations.zh: 「待汝獻祭之時辰已至，吾將告知。」

translations.en: "Begone, False Prophet! To seize you for sacrifice the instant my army returns from the Underworld!"
translations.zh: 「偽先知，滾開！吾之大軍自幽冥界歸返之際，便是擒汝獻祭之時！」

translations.en: "To be here to surrender?"
translations.zh: 「前來歸降？」

translations.en: "To be willing to die to save my people?"
translations.zh: 「願以一死拯救吾族？」

translations.en: "To grant me your life?"
translations.zh: 「願將性命相授？」

translations.en: "Why?"
translations.zh: 「為何？」

translations.en: "To ignore the rhetoric of the False Prophet!"
translations.zh: 「莫理偽先知之詭辯！」

translations.en: "To grow impatient with your babbling!"
translations.zh: 「汝之喋喋不休令吾不耐！」

translations.en: "To warn you of imminent attack!"
translations.zh: 「警告汝——攻擊將至！」

translator_notes: 崔西努森為魔像族統領，語氣威嚴傲慢，對偽先知（Avatar）極度不信任。魔像語叫喊原文保留。遇見玩家在不同狀態下有不同反應（護符前/護符後）。
